channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Armed man shot and killed after entering secure perimeter of Mar-a-Lago, Secret Service says
item.description: Trump was not there but was at the White House in Washington.

item.title: Blizzard warnings cascade across East Coast with winter storm’s approach
TSA says PreCheck still operational after previous announcement of suspension during funding fight
